prompt: A cute minimalist portrait of a young woman sitting casually on the floor in a clean studio setting with a light grey background. She wears an oversized dark charcoal hoodie, cream straight-leg pants, white socks, and chunky white sneakers. She sits in a relaxed pose with her legs crossed, one eye slightly closed in a playful wink and a soft, warm smile. Behind her, a large black-and-white doodle character hugs her from behind, wrapping its cartoon arms around her shoulders and gently squeezing her cheek in an affectionate, playful way. The composition is clean and minimal, with soft studio lighting, subtle shadows, a cozy aesthetic, high-end editorial quality, and a charming blend of real-life portrait photography with whimsical illustrated elements. The overall mood is cute, comforting, stylish, and heartwarming.
